author: Dmitry Romanenko
message:
Rewrite theme detection, add testing script (#430)

* Rewrite theme detection, add testing script

* Refactor to simplify adding new themes

* Change opacity of overlay to improve visibility on white backgrounds

* Attempt to fix scaling identification issues

* Various adjustments
* Add colorblind filter detection
* Add more precise detection of scaling straight from last EE.cfg (saves state after exiting game)
* Changes to scaling formulas for finding the right theme
* New location for theme detection selected
* Race conditions fixes
* Fixes for tests
* Fixes for status updates
* Fixes for theming showing incorrect background color on buttons
* Fixes for infinite attempts to reattach to EE.log when game is exited then launched again
* Add SKILL for tesseract.net to help investigating issues

* refactor(WFInfo): OCR cleanup, Tesseract fallback, overlay dedup

Ocr.cs — static split char arrays, pattern matching simplifications,
division shorthand, collection init syntax, method renames
(ProbeProfilePixel, UpdateEngineAsync), avoid redundant lookups.

TesseractService.cs — try primary tessdata path before fallback,
engine dispose cleanup on failure.

Main.cs — guard against stacking duplicate ColorblindWarning windows.

SnapItOverlay.xaml(.cs) — extracted SetRectangles helper, fixed typo,
repositioned exit prompt for correct centering.

WarframeProcessFinder.cs — reliable _lastDetectionFailed flag for
accurate status messages.

Styles.xaml — MultiTrigger for hover only when control enabled.

SettingsWindow.xaml.cs — UpdateEngineAsync rename.

ColorblindWarning.xaml — removed empty TextBlock style.

* fix: locale change error handling, colorblind I/O off UI thread

- Move OCR.UpdateEngineAsync into Task.Run with existing
  try/catch/logging/error-popup for locale failures
- Hoist EE.cfg file I/O into Task.Run at call site, dispatch
  only window creation to UI thread
- Remove file I/O from SpawnColorblindWarning (now caller's
  responsibility)

* fix: serialize locale refresh to prevent concurrent races

Cancel in-flight locale refresh before starting a new one
via CancellationTokenSource. Check cancellation between
OCR.UpdateEngineAsync and Main.dataBase.ReloadItems so a
superseded refresh discards its result before mutating data.

* fix: reward screen OOB and theme probe at non-16:9 resolutions

- ExtractPartBoxAutomatically: use fullScreen bitmap dimensions instead of
  Win32 window rect; clamp clone regions to prevent out-of-bounds on
  sub-4K screens
- ScreenScaling: Math.Max → Math.Min — game scales UI to constraining
  dimension (width for 4:3, height for ultrawide); verified via pixel
  measurement of theme stripe at 800x600
- SnapIt: extract DetectScalingBruteForce, add ForceLegacyScaling toggle

* fix: SnapIt scaling fallback used wrong detector for inventory overlay

DetectScalingBruteForce (TextSegments-based) was designed for reward
screen text boxes, not the SnapIt inventory grid. Revert to
DetectUiScale (row-height density) which is layout-agnostic.
Remove dead DetectScalingBruteForce method.

* feat(legacy-detection): add ForceLegacyDetection for old theme/crop mechanics

Rename ForceLegacyScaling → ForceLegacyDetection. When enabled:
- GetThemeWeighted: full screenshot + trapezoid scan with GetClosestTheme
  using current ThemePrimary[] colors, LockBits fast pixel access,
  debug saves trapezoid outline as ThemeScanArea_*
- ExtractPartBoxAutomatically: oversized initial crop from
  _window.Window dimensions, pixelRewardLineHeight constant,
  clamped to bitmap bounds
- Theme overwrite skips scan entirely
- SnapIt fallback still uses DetectUiScale when config unreadable

author: Dmitry Romanenko
message:
Add new theme support and improve localization handling (#423)

* Minor stability improvements

* Patches for blueprint wording, escaping, forma

* Various patches

* Add simple AGENTS.md to simplify debugging

* Adjust scaling formulas to avoid duplication + compensation for Sparse mode

* Fix counting

* Derive size of weights dynamically from theme count

* Remove redundant variables and methods for tesseract services

* Force usage of caveman for some efficiency with tokens

* Refactor post-processing towards conditional fallback straight in method

* Tweak for english accuracy

* Add upscaling where required, compensate mismatches for blueprint fragment

* Correction for overlay display positioning to be scale aware

* Correction for word concatetions

* Compensation for korean, shift to language specific part checks

* Isolate the language specific cleanup for blueprint properly

* Fix headless OCR test framework execution

* Upgrade dependencies

* Less magic numbers more generic configs

author: Dmitry Romanenko
message:
Add multi-language support (#413)

* Fix orders being posted as hidden

* * Add support most languages except of Thai, Japanese and Turkish
* Add foundation for test framework for OCR

* Coderabbit suggestions

* Various corrections to accuracy and rabbit's review patches

* Sort the error zip parts to ensure part0 always the first one to get settings and debug.log

* Resolve Chinese filtering bug, nitpick corrections for rabbit

* Fix sorting of parts for split zip

* Remove redundant test sections

* Rabbit nitpicks

* Rabbit fixes, cleanup korean from unnecessary manual filtering

* Fix rabbit suggestions

* Rabbit review corrections

* Fix korean, improve chinese, refactor and clean future test bed

* Rabbit review patches

* Rabbit review patches

* Rabbit review patches

* Rabbit review patches, better handling of glyph languages

* Add autogeneration of .zip and update.xml

* Add workaround to avoid I/O blockign

* Hopefully now fully fix the ranges

* Fix rabbit findings

* Various corrections

* Fix various logical issues with mechanics

* Rabbit patches

* Various performance and memory tweaks, deduplication of HTTP clients, extra async handling and screenshots now only saved in filesystem under Debug flag

* Rabbit corrections

* Add better error handling

* Rabbit fixes + logic fix for fissure

* Rabbit patches

* Restore the debug screenshot storing

* Upgrade dependencies and patch zip creation

* Remove redundant file
